description_long: This is a heavy-duty dumbbell with a robust, hexagonal design on both ends, which helps prevent rolling when placed on the ground. The ends are solid and dark-colored, likely made of dense rubber or coated metal, and feature flat faces with visible markings. The handle is metallic, cylindrical, and ergonomically contoured, possibly with a knurled or textured grip for secure handling. One end displays the brand name 'TIEN DAT' and the other shows the weight marking '50', both embossed into the surface. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A solid, hexagonal dumbbell with a contoured metallic handle and embossed brand and weight markings on the end caps. The surface is clean and appears new.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dumbbell, highlighting the contoured metallic handle and the hexagonal end caps.
description_view_1: End-on view focusing on one hexagonal cap, showing its flat face and the depth of the dumbbell.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying both end caps, with clear visibility of the 'TIEN DAT' brand and '50' weight marking.
description_view_3: End-on view of the other hexagonal cap, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, metallic handle with a round cross-section and likely knurled texture for grip.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced end caps made of dark rubber or coated metal, with embossed markings and a matte finish.
attribute_brand_logo: Brand logo 'TIEN DAT' is embossed on one end cap, clearly visible.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight marking '50' is embossed on the opposite end cap, clearly visible.
attribute_condition: The dumbbell appears new and unused, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
